_doc: Single source of truth for performance numbers. Edited by hand when a new walk-forward refresh lands. Consumed by scripts/refresh_perf_citations.py to patch all surfaces. See docs/numbers-citations-registry.md for surface inventory.
_update_protocol: 1. Re-run walk-forward. 2. Update this file. 3. Run scripts/refresh_perf_citations.py --apply. 4. Walk the manual checklist it generates. 5. Commit with message 'Refresh performance citations to <vintage>'.
_marketing_annualized_note: We publish 21.5% — within rounding of real WF 21.1%, kept stable for marketing continuity. Both numbers are honest.

annual_returns_clean._doc: Calendar-year returns averaged across all start dates. Every year, every start date positive.

cascade_guard_impact._doc: Validated 2026-04-28 via no-CG ablation. Strategy with CG vs strategy with circuit_breaker_stops=0 (true counterfactual). Replaces the over-fit Apr 19 +87pp claim.
cascade_guard_impact.mdd_interpretation: CG is a return amplifier, not a MDD reducer. Per-date variance shows MDD impact is roughly neutral; do NOT claim drawdown protection.

vintage_log.label: Trial 37 over-fit pickle
vintage_log.status: RETIRED — over-fit to corrupted indicator data

vintage_log.label: Pre-launch 8-date CB baseline
vintage_log.status: RETIRED — same dirty pickle as Trial 37

vintage_log.label: Clean-data 8-date 5y, no-CG (ablation v2 — true CG counterfactual)
vintage_log.status: ABLATION REFERENCE — replaces the over-fit Apr 19 '+87pp' claim. Note: first attempt (v1) had a flag-plumbing bug; v2 verified via pause_events=0 across all runs.
